chapter.01.title: Wang Family Village
chapter.02.title: Ghost Spirit Mountain
chapter.03.title: Zhao Kingdom
chapter.04.title: Moon Lake Ruins
chapter.05.title: Fire Burn Country
chapter.06.title: Heavenly Tribulation Pass
chapter.07.title: Ice Palace Ruins
chapter.08.title: Inner Demon Pass
chapter.09.title: Lôi Tiên Gate
chapter.10.title: Thunder Immortal Hall
story.ch01.slide01: Heng Yue Sect rejected me — poor roots, unworthy of discipleship. Wang Family Village burned; I had only bare fists and humiliation.
story.ch01.slide02: The jade slip trembled in my hand. First qi flowed through my meridians — I walked the cultivation road though none believed I would go far on Chu Tước Star.
story.ch01.slide03: Ghost Spirit Mountain loomed in mist ahead. Wang Lin did not look back — perseverance is my dao.
story.ch02.slide01: On Ghost Spirit Mountain, a fox spirit watched from the fog — testing will, not talent.
story.ch02.slide02: In the stone cave, a blade slept in seal. Heaven Reverse — cultivate against heaven; the sword answered my qi, not my gifts.
story.ch02.slide03: I took the Heaven Reverse Sword and turned toward Zhao Kingdom. Fortune on this chân tinh had changed my fate.
story.ch03.slide01: Zhao bandits blocked the road — blades broke against my will. I was no longer the boy expelled from the sect.
story.ch03.slide02: Moonlight glimmered on distant Moon Lake — an ancient seal trembled beneath the water.
story.ch04.slide01: The seal under Moon Lake cracked. I saw corruption stirring — Chu Tước Star Domain still hid many secrets.
story.ch04.slide02: A star-domain gate opened to the south. La Thiên Star Domain awaited — where cultivators far stronger than I held sway.
story.ch05.slide01: Fire Burn Country — scorching sand and demonic cultivators. I survived by will, not luck.
story.ch05.slide02: Tribulation clouds rose on distant peaks. Heavenly thunder would test me — as tales tell of those who reverse heaven.
story.ch06.slide01: Heavenly tribulation fell — lightning recognized me. Wang Lin did not kneel; I swallowed thunder into my meridians.
story.ch06.slide02: The northern ice palace held memories of the past. I entered — colder than any night on Chu Tước Star.
story.ch07.slide01: In the ice halls, echoes of the past lingered. I understood — cultivation trades memory for power.
story.ch07.slide02: Leaving La Thiên Star Domain, I turned toward Lôi Tiên Realm — still within the Inner Realm, behind the Phong Giới Great Formation.
story.ch08.slide01: The inner demon pass before Lôi Tiên Gate. The Heaven Reverse Pearl trembled — its seal protects the Inner Realm from the Outer.
story.ch08.slide02: I defeated my heart demon and did not retreat. Ahead lies Lôi Tiên Gate — the end of the Inner Realm road draws near.
story.ch09.slide01: Lôi Tiên Gate guardians tested my cultivated heart. I did not beg mercy — only passage into Lôi Tiên Realm.
story.ch09.slide02: The gate opened. Thunder Immortal Hall at the Inner Realm's end — I had gone too far on Chu Tước Star to turn back.
story.ch10.slide01: At Thunder Immortal Hall, journey and destination were one. Wang Lin — from mocked boy to one who stands before thunder immortals within the Inner Realm.
story.ch10.slide02: Lightning enveloped me. The Outer Realm still lies beyond Phong Giới — but today, I reached Thunder Immortal Hall.
